description: Provider adapter catalog. Endpoint values, credentials, and machine-specific configuration are runtime-only and must never be committed.

providers.name: Local Ollama Text
providers.notes: Fixture and bounded Windows local-endpoint chat, writing, summarization, typed-artifact, sanitization, cleanup, and cross-platform contract validation passed. Runtime endpoint and installed-model availability remain configuration-dependent.

providers.name: Local llama.cpp Text
providers.notes: The shared adapter contract passed on Windows, Linux, and macOS paths. Transport selection is admitted only for exact llama.cpp engine/backend/hardware profiles in the inference engine registry. HIP on Windows AMD and CUDA on Linux NVIDIA passed bounded engine validation, but the adapter awaits a direct live llama.cpp server run; other profiles fail closed.

providers.name: Local ComfyUI Image
providers.notes: Bounded Linux ComfyUI SDXL API generation, checksum, CUDA, typed-artifact, metadata exclusion, history cleanup, recovery, SSH tunnel, and cross-platform contract validation passed. Runtime endpoint and installed-checkpoint availability remain configuration-dependent.
